title: Terms of Service (Part 1/2)
heading: Terms of Service
text:
[Skip to Main Content] | -A A A+ | | English हिन्दी ગુજરાતી বাংলা मराठी অসমীয়া ଓରିୟା ਪੰਜਾਬੀ தமிழ் తెలుగు ಕನ್ನಡ മലയാളം #### Terms of Service These terms of service (Terms) govern your use of MeriPehchaan , the National Single Sign On platform and the services provided thereunder. Please read these terms and conditions (Terms) carefully before you use the MeriPehchaan platform and its services. By clicking on the “I Agree” button, you signify your acceptance of the Terms and your agreement to be bound by them. The Terms may be amended from time to time. In order to continue using the MeriPehchaan Platform, you will be required to read and accept the revised Terms.'
MeriPehchaan #### Service Overview MeriPehchaan is the national level common single sign-on platform, which interfaces with the following Single Sign On (SSO) applications from Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology (MeitY) : * DigiLocker
* Jan Parichay
* e-Pramaan By interfacing with the above mentioned SSO applications, MeriPehchaan #### Terms of Use 1. MeitY reserves the right to make changes to MeriPehchaan and these terms of use at any time. If those changes affect your rights or responsibilities, you will be notified through the MeriPehchaan portal. 2. These Terms of Service shall come into effect as soon as you have accepted it and created your MeriPehchaan
3. As a user of MeriPehchaan you are granted a nonexclusive, non-transferable, revocable, limited license to access and use MeriPehchaan in accordance with these Terms of Use. MeitY/Govt. of India may terminate this license at any time for any reason. 4. Though all efforts have been made to ensure the accuracy of the content on MeriPehchaan, the same should not be construed as a statement of law or used for any legal purposes.
